exceptions.reason: Enter runs the active command (`run.emit(command)`) but does not itself close the popup -- unlike React's CommandPalette.jsx, whose internal `run()` calls `onClose()` unconditionally before invoking the command. Every controlled overlay in this layer puts the open-mutating decision on the host (`open` is an input the component never writes itself), matching arena-confirm-dialog's confirm/cancel and arena-onboarding's done/skip; command-palette.prompt.md's own documented example wires `(run)="paletteOpen.set(false); dispatch($event)"`. This is the deliberate Angular idiom, not a bug -- see components-divergences.md's 'CommandPalette -- running a command does not close the palette in Angular' -- but it means a host that forgets to close on `run` leaves the palette open after running, so the requirement is recorded unmet from the component's own behaviour.
